provenance.source_corpus: Forest floor protection during drilling pad construction promotes resprouting of aspen

source_spans.text: Forest floor protection during drilling pad construction promotes resprouting of aspen
Aspen suckers were tallest, had the highest density and had better survival when the forest floor was protected compared to the standard Rollback treatment.
Aspen suckers were tallest, had the highest density and had better survival when the forest floor was protected compared to the standard Rollback treatment.
Aspen suckers were tallest, had the highest density and had better survival when the forest floor was protected compared to the standard Rollback treatment.
Forest floor gouging increased sucker density
Slash load was found to reduce growing season soil temperature
Slash load was found to reduce growing season soil temperature
The Rollback caused severe root wounding and fragmentation to the original root system.

Such damage likely leads to root fungal infection ( Pankuch et al., 2003 ), decreased sucker health ( DesRochers and Lieffers 2001; Renkema et al., 2009 ) and subsequently to high fragment mortality (Wachowski et al., 2014 ).
The Rollback caused severe root wounding and fragmentation to the original root system.
